script.description: KPI Card Set - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for displaying configurable KPI cards.

value.value: Sample metrics for service request operations

script.description: Distribution Chart Module - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for grouped category/count analytics.

value.value: Seeded service requests grouped by status

script.description: Trend Chart Module - reusable Yeeflow dashboard custom code template for time-based list trends.
Smart Lookup Picker - reusable Yeeflow lookup/search-select control for approval forms and data list forms.

inputParameters.name: Data List ID
inputParameters.desc: Target Yeeflow data list ID used for lookup query.

inputParameters.name: Display Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used for display text and keyword search matching.

inputParameters.name: Value Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used as the saved value for selected matched items.

inputParameters.name: Save To Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save the full combined JSON result. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Selected Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save matched selected values only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: New Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save manual/free-text items only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Multi Select
inputParameters.desc: Whether multi-select is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Allow Manual Entry
inputParameters.desc: Whether manual/free-text entry is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Max Results
inputParameters.desc: Maximum number of matched records shown in the suggestion list.

inputParameters.name: Placeholder Text
inputParameters.desc: Placeholder text shown in the lookup input.

inputParameters.name: Label Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label/title shown above the control.

inputParameters.name: No Result Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no matched records are found.

inputParameters.name: Manual Tag Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label shown on manual item chips.

inputParameters.name: Minimum Search Characters
inputParameters.desc: Optional minimum characters before querying. Default is 1.

inputParameters.name: Search Debounce Milliseconds
inputParameters.desc: Optional search debounce delay. Default is 260.

value.value: Search asset, vendor, or related record

instances.containerPlacement: child list LayoutInResources[0].Resource custom form JSON

control.label: Data List Form Smart Lookup Picker
control.title: Data List Form Smart Lookup Picker

script.description: Smart Lookup Picker - reusable Yeeflow lookup/search-select control for approval forms and data list forms.

inputParameters.name: Data List ID
inputParameters.desc: Target Yeeflow data list ID used for lookup query.

inputParameters.name: Display Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used for display text and keyword search matching.

inputParameters.name: Value Field
inputParameters.desc: Field ID/name used as the saved value for selected matched items.

inputParameters.name: Save To Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save the full combined JSON result. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Selected Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save matched selected values only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: New Items Field
inputParameters.desc: Writable current form field or dashboard temp variable used to save manual/free-text items only. Choose the target variable/field from the selector.

inputParameters.name: Multi Select
inputParameters.desc: Whether multi-select is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Allow Manual Entry
inputParameters.desc: Whether manual/free-text entry is enabled. Use true or false.

inputParameters.name: Max Results
inputParameters.desc: Maximum number of matched records shown in the suggestion list.

inputParameters.name: Placeholder Text
inputParameters.desc: Placeholder text shown in the lookup input.

inputParameters.name: Label Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label/title shown above the control.

inputParameters.name: No Result Text
inputParameters.desc: Text shown when no matched records are found.

inputParameters.name: Manual Tag Text
inputParameters.desc: Optional label shown on manual item chips.

inputParameters.name: Minimum Search Characters
inputParameters.desc: Optional minimum characters before querying. Default is 1.

inputParameters.name: Search Debounce Milliseconds
inputParameters.desc: Optional search debounce delay. Default is 260.

Choose a category and dependent service type
